wine_museums.name: Museo Vivanco de la Cultura del Vino
wine_museums.address: Carretera Nacional 232, 26330 Briones, La Rioja, Spain
wine_museums.admission: Museum on your own from EUR 18; guided museum from EUR 22; combined museum and guided wine cellar from EUR 26 booked online
wine_museums.description: World-class wine culture museum in Briones spanning 4,000 sqm with five permanent rooms and the Baco garden of 220-plus vine varieties.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera Nacional 232, 26330. Briones - La Rioja. Spain

wine_museums.name: Villa Lucia Centro Tematico del Vino
wine_museums.address: Carretera de Logrono s/n, 01300 Laguardia, Alava, Spain
wine_museums.admission: Museum tour plus the In a Dreamland 4D sensory experience; combinable with the on-site restaurant
wine_museums.description: Fully accessible wine theme centre in medieval Laguardia with virtual tastings, didactic panels and a 4D In a Dreamland sensory finale.

wine_museums.name: Marques de Riscal Catedral del Vino
wine_museums.admission: Visited as part of the City of Wine winery tour with ticket reservation
wine_museums.description: Marques de Riscal's original 1860 cellar, the Catedral del Vino, preserves bottle treasures back to 1862 and is toured within the Gehry City of Wine.
